expectations.text: Response contains required substrings (n_chunks, cache_likelihood, XLA_PYTHON_CLIENT_MEM_FRACTION, DecodingParameters, ClusterlessDecodingV1).
expectations.evidence: All required substrings present throughout response.md.

expectations.text: Shows DecodingParameters.insert1 with decoding_kwargs as sibling top-level (NOT nested in decoding_params)
expectations.evidence: Insert example has 'decoding_params' and 'decoding_kwargs' as sibling keys; explicitly: 'on DecodingParameters, decoding_params and decoding_kwargs are sibling top-level attributes, NOT one nested inside the other'.

expectations.text: Includes concrete n_chunks (integer) and cache_likelihood=False values
Mentions XLA_PYTHON_CLIENT_MEM_FRACTION as a complementary lever
expectations.evidence: Section (2) titled 'Raise the JAX memory cap' sets `os.environ['XLA_PYTHON_CLIENT_MEM_FRACTION'] = '0.95'` and notes 'Complementary to chunking — use both'.

expectations.text: Identifies decoding_kwargs are passed through to predict() vs estimate_parameters() per branch; doesn't claim estimate_parameters rejects them without checking
expectations.evidence: Walks both branches with line numbers; explicitly: 'Don't assume estimate_parameters() rejects them without checking — it may accept the same OOM knobs depending on version'.

expectations.text: Does not recommend upgrading the GPU as the primary fix
expectations.evidence: 'Don't upgrade the GPU. A 24 GiB intermediate inside an 80 GiB device is a chunking problem, not a hardware problem'.

expectations.text: Does not include v0 decoding knobs (sorted_spikes_algorithm_params, block_size)
expectations.evidence: Explicitly: 'Don't reach for v0 sorted-spikes knobs (sorted_spikes_algorithm_params, block_size, etc.) — those belong to the v0 sorted-spikes path'.
